title: Talking about my life - Boulder, Colorado 5/21

transcript.text: Yeah so we played capture the flag and I think we were playing like capture the flag or tag or
Something once even at school one day and I remember like one of the first days I was there
Um there was some kid we were supposed to like pull the flag off him or something and
He ran up really fast and like pushed me and ran off that was solly halpern and I was like whoa
That kid's on another level he was like really athletic and he was like running faster and I was
Like all right cool because I felt like I was the only kid who was athletic who would like actually
Run fast it seemed like all the other kids were like weak they'd run slow and stuff you know
But I was like cool another kid who can run fast and stuff but um yeah but like we we also made this
One thing um this like fort uh out of like all this sticks leaned up against a tree
And then filled it up with like um
Hay and stuff and we went in there under the direction of jonathan the leader but like after
The winter and it was there after the winter but then we were forced to turn it tear it down
The teacher still has to tear it down because it became like a nesting ground for all these bugs and
Stuff and they thought it was like not hygienic or something and like the older kids like had one
Off in the distance but like they didn't let any of us and young kids know where it was it was
Supposed to be like a secret or something so I never saw it and a lot of the younger kids they'd
Like collect like bugs they'd have these like little glass containers with all these different spiders and
Stuff in it and I was like wow man nice job and uh I think the leader of the group above me the kids
Older than me well there was gesar he was the son of rinpoche and then there was vajra rich he was the son
Of the regent who was like the second in command dude and I think he thought he was like the leader
Too because I remember once you couldn't get these kids to go to like work on the fort with him and
He was all pissed off that they wouldn't listen to him and I was like looking at him in the glare of
The sun so I was doing like this and he's like don't smile at me like he thought I was making fun of
Him for kids not like listening to him I was like okay dude whatever man and yeah and uh let's see
Talk about other kids well I mentioned solly halper and I'm I'm I spent the night at his house one day
And I tried to teach him how to ride a bike like even though he was really athletic he didn't know
How to ride a bike but he had a bike and I was trying to teach him and push him down but he lost
Interest and didn't really want to know so and he had a sister there but she was younger so we
Didn't talk to her and his mom like made me they were doing chores and his mom like had me help out
The chores I didn't really like that but um yeah he lived up north near like north boulder park and
Then oh yeah and then like claire claire oh my god I can't remember her last name claire claire lived like
Near me because her dad did lived right around the corner from me on the same block so I hung out
With her all the time and once the school went on a school outing skiing at aldora and it was before I
Ever went skiing so I must have been like seven because I went skiing for the first time when I was
Eight and she crashed and broke her leg and so I visited her and like signed her cast and I didn't go
That day I don't know why like I was sick or like my parents didn't let me or something but I didn't go
And there was this other outing that the school did where it was like ride the the uh the inner
Tubes down the river all the way down boulder creek and like but before we did it we had to like
We had to prove that we could like ride the inner tube underneath the tunnel and like we went out
There and I didn't want to do it I just didn't I felt like it was dangerous and so they're like so
They didn't let me do the tube trip but I didn't really care anyways for some reason even though it
Was a cool little adventure I just um yeah and then another year I don't remember how many years
I went there maybe it was like first grade second grade I know I went there first and second grade
So maybe it was just first and second grade and then I went there fourth grade but like one of the
Years we had a woman teacher and we were on the upstairs and we were learning the um multiplication
Tables and I was the last person to memorize all the multiplication tables as as along with
Jeremy king and we went out like the thing was when you once you learned it like the motivation is the
Teacher is going to go and buy you an ice cream so she took us down the two of us to buy us an ice
Cream and I wasn't yeah I wasn't really interested in that whole multiplication table thing and other
Kids were like some of them learned it right away and we're like yay and I was just like I just wasn't
Into that um and I guess I was kind of a spaced out kid because I was always getting in trouble for
Like not paying attention or something like that because I was always getting punished and my punishment
Was I had to get up in front of the whole class and tell stories but I was kind of like the class clown
And so I would get up there and I would just I'd tell these stories about I'd make up stories about how I was
Like superhuman and like I'd get all like animated and talk really fast and loud and like be like
Yeah you know they needed me to like uh save the world so I I got in this like f-15 super jet man and
Like the jet didn't have any wheels on it so like we had to use our legs to get the speed going and
Then we took off and like there was no floor in the jet so like my friend fell out but I had to grab
And like all the kids were like rolling and laughter and they were like and so like every
Time I got in trouble their kids were like eventually they were like get in trouble kyle
Tell us another story and so she eventually had to stop using that as a uh as a like a punishment
Because like because like I I got to the point where like I we all wanted me to tell a story every
Day like one day um we were playing like there's this one thing we had we did is where we would
Like stack up these like little like wooden you know like pieces on these big like fortress type
Things like block buildings and um and then we'd like we'd like you know sit on the other side of
The room and throw the other pieces that I've been trying to knock them down and once I we had
This really tall one man that was like two feet tall and I threw a block at it and it knocked one
Of the blocks off on one of like the things that held the support and the whole thing it knocked the
Block right out and the whole thing fell down on top of the new block and it didn't fall over and we
Were like whoa that was totally crazy it was about that time there and I was like I started skiing all
The time and I was like so I was like writing stories and I guess because we one of our things
Would write stories and tell stories and I was really good at storytelling and writing
And I would like write about skiing and I was like yeah man I ski all the time and I ski this and I ski
That and I'm the best skier and all this stuff and I remember it like piss some kids off because
They were like jealous and the teacher was like don't talk so much about skiing or don't say so much
About how good of a skier you are and stuff and I was like what man I'm just telling I'm just telling
Why did they get pissed off of that but um yeah and uh oh yeah and there's I'll just talk about
Some of the more of the kids uh because that's interesting there's this one girl naomi weber
And she was like tall she was the tallest girl
And uh her dad was a doctor phil weber I think he was my doctor she had a she had a brother named
Aaron and he was a year older and he was she was just as tall as him but um anyways she had this
Like hair ties on these really pretty hair ties that would like tie her hair and she had a different
One every day and I remember going every day and looking at her hair and being like okay trying to
See if I could remember recognize a hair tie from another day and she literally had a different hair
Tie every single day in the whole year she must have had like hundreds of them or something like that
And then there is this other girl um megan susness she was really weird like I don't think I ever heard
Her talk I mean she was really like she was one of the girls none of the girls made fun of her like
She was protected by all the other girls but she was like never talked and if and if any of the guys
Tried to talk to her because she was like feminist or something she only liked girls and I don't know
Maybe it turned out that she ended up being a lesbian but she like if you try to talk to her she go
She thought she was a cat and she would like and like hiss at you so you'd be like all right I won't
Talk to you but she was really smart like she read all the time and so she would like win all of
The fucking spelling bees she knew how to spell like perfectly and um but yeah one time um we we had
To do like meditation for 10 minutes every single day where you have to like focus on the wall on
Like one point on the wall and just like not think and we did that every day it was like because it was
Like a buddhist school and one time she I guess didn't know that she was allowed to get up and pee
So we looked back and she was sitting there and pee was falling off of her chair onto the floor and
Then she started crying and the teacher was like oh yeah no if you have to pee go pee but uh oh yeah
And then there was another girl rachel fulton um and then who else and then there was that other girl
Who was a good runner and I don't she was only there she was she was like a late show or upper
So I don't remember her name I'm sure there were lots of girls and there was cara baker but like
Cara baker um I think she was a smart girl too but she she her parents bought her for her she was
Like one day older than me she's like born december 26 and I'm born december 27th and she like
For her birthday when she was like 10 or a nine or something her parents bought her a black pooch 10
Speed and I had at the time I had a three speed bicycle with a banana seat and I rode that thing
Everywhere I rode that thing for my house and you know baseline and broadway all the way down to table
Mesa on the bike path and then up this hill all the time like back and forth and I mean there were
Bike paths around like the cemetery and like behind the cemetery and I just ride all over the place and
I remember I thought that was cool because like all the other kids their parents wouldn't let them
Go more than like a block from the house but my parents didn't care they let me ride as far as I
Wanted so it was fun and uh but but she got this 10 speed and I was like all of a sudden I was like
Wait I can't have a girl have a better bike than me like that's fucked up and she I mean she was happy
To have it but she wasn't like totally like bouncing off the walls and I was like man fuck this so I
Went over and I told my parents I was like man there's this fucking girl has a 10 speed what and
Until then I thought I was the coolest kid because I had a three speed bike I was like I need to fuck you
I need a bike a better bike and so my parents took me over to the uh schwinn store on 28th street that
Doesn't exist anymore and um and I bought the same exact bike that she had only I only mine was red
Instead of black and when we were when we showed up there um they were like they they said that they
Had the bike races the youth the red zinger mini classic bike races and that's what I was like
That so my parents were like you want to do it and I was like fuck yeah I'm doing it
So I signed up for it it was that summer so that was 10 um but yeah that girl cara baker she like um
I guess she was her her parents were friends with jonathan mckeever's parents and so they used to be
Best friends but before I showed up there I guess they had a they had a falling out at a restaurant
And like he pushed her down the stairs because like she like embarrassed him about something
So then he decided he hated her so like because that like all the guys were supposed to hate her
So like I was supposed to hate her and I remember once I was hanging out with
Claire what the hell was claire's last name
Anyway claire and like cara was hanging out with her and like so my mother was like taking care of us
And driving us around and she and I was like refusing to talk to cara because I wasn't supposed
To because jonathan said we weren't supposed to and I remember claire was like you don't like cara
And I was like no and the car was like I want to go home so my mom had to take her home I felt really
Bad about that afterwards that was a dick move that was like the only dick move that I've ever had as a
Kid I was a pretty cool kid I guess I was just too loyal to jonathan and one day he like gave away
His leadership because one day we went out we went running around like following him around and he was
A good leader he was a really cool kid like making like designs in the rocks and like who stayed behind
I think it was jeremy king and solly halpern stayed behind and um or maybe it was solly halpern and uh
Noah mcclellan and they like stayed behind like working on the fort so when we came back jonathan
Was like all right I'm not the leader anymore these guys are the leaders now because they stayed behind
And like played with the fort so like they were the leaders for a little bit but then I think he got his
Leadership back just naturally because everybody wanted him to be the leader so it's kind of funny
But um oh no I'm out of time
You
